name: Midnight kisses//Adrian☆
description:
Heyy!! Happy new year!! I wish you sm luck into the year 2025 I hope you win all the battles you don't talk about and even the one you do don't forget that you're much stronger than you think and I'm so proud of you<33

Happy new year <333
